title: I'm building an app that lets you create algo trading strategies without coding - looking for feedback
author: WolfPossible5371
selftext:
I've been working on SpendDock for the past few months and wanted to share + get feedback.

**The problem:** A lot of people want to automate their trading strategies but hit a wall because you need to code. I tried learning Python for this and gave up twice.

**What I built:** You describe your strategy in plain English (like "buy Bitcoin when it drops 10% from its weekly high") and the app turns it into a real strategy, backtests it against historical data, and can run it automatically.

**Where I'm at:** Early stage, building integration with brokerages like Interactive Broker. Got a waitlist going and looking for people who want to try it when it's ready.

If you've ever wanted to automate trading but felt overwhelmed by the technical side, I'd love your thoughts. What would make something like this useful to you?

Waitlist: www(dot)spenddock(dot).com

comments.author: WolfPossible5371
comments.body: Here's the waitlist if you're interested: [www.spenddock.com](http://www.spenddock.com)

comments.author: shazuwuu
comments.body:
i've been using something similar called [finstocks.ai](http://finstocks.ai) and it's way more fabulous than this.  
\- backtest strategies in plain english  
\- prompt "invest 15k" and it automates buy/sell directly in your demat account after analysing all fundamentals, tech indicators, news etc  
\- literally just chat like you do with chatgpt to do anything related to trading.

comments.author: cherry-pick-crew
comments.body:
Building something similar but for predictions markets check it out
